headline: Baxter International (BAX) Stock Valuation Check After Recent Double Digit Gains And Ongoing Turnaround Plans
summary: Baxter International (BAX) has attracted fresh attention after recent trading, with the stock showing double digit returns over the past month and past 3 months. This performance is prompting investors to reassess its current valuation. See our latest analysis for Baxter International. The recent move takes Baxter International's share price to US$20.86, with share price returns of 20.58% over 30 days and 22.13% over 90 days, while the 1 year total shareholder return has declined 31.29%.
